title: Parallax PBR
description: Parallax PBR is a Realistic Texture Pack that enhances Minecraft with Detailed Textures and Immersive Visuals, bringing a touch of Reality to your blocky world.
body:
**- What is Parallax PBR?**

Parallax PBR is a Realistic Texture Pack that enhances Minecraft with Detailed Textures and Immersive Visuals, bringing a touch of Reality to your blocky world.

---

**Required Mods**
- Optifine or Iris/Sodium

Higher Resolutions are available on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/MSameedC).

Join my [Discord community](https://discord.gg/PCF6PwMb9z) for up-to-date updates.

---
